race.name: Orsa Gronklitt Ski Marathon
race.tagline: Forty-two kilometers through the forests of Dalarna at one of Sweden's most respected Nordic venues — a Vasaloppet qualifier on classic terrain.

climate.description: Late January in Dalarna's interior means deep cold and reliable snow cover. Temperatures range from -20°C to -5°C. The Gronklitt area at 400-550m altitude receives consistent snowfall and the cold preserves excellent trail conditions. Short daylight hours in late January — sunrise around 9:00, sunset around 15:30.
challenges: Deep cold — temperatures can drop below -20°C
Short daylight hours in late January Swedish winter
Cold wax selection critical in sub-zero conditions

course.primary: A 42km classic-technique course through the extensive Nordic trail network at Gronklitt, one of Sweden's premier cross-country skiing destinations. Rolling forested terrain through birch and spruce at 400-550m altitude. The course serves as an official qualifying race for both Vasaloppet and Tjejvasan.
course.grooming: Gronklitt Nordic center — one of Sweden's best-groomed trail systems
features: Official Vasaloppet and Tjejvasan qualifying race
Gronklitt — one of Sweden's premier XC skiing destinations
Deep Dalarna forest terrain — birch and spruce
Reliable winter conditions in Sweden's ski heartland

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum snow reliability in Dalarna's cold interior. Excellent grooming at the Gronklitt Nordic center. Functions primarily as a Vasaloppet qualifier, which limits its standalone prestige but ensures good organization.

history.summary: The Orsa Gronklitt Ski Marathon takes place at one of Sweden's most respected Nordic ski venues in the heart of Dalarna — the spiritual home of Swedish skiing and the Vasaloppet. The race serves as an official qualifying event for both Vasaloppet and Tjejvasan, drawing skiers who use it as preparation for the larger events in the same region. Gronklitt's extensive trail network and reliable conditions make it a natural host for citizen racing.
notable_facts: Official qualifying race for Vasaloppet and Tjejvasan
Held at Gronklitt — one of Sweden's premier XC skiing destinations
Located in Dalarna, the spiritual home of Swedish skiing
Same venue hosts the Craft Ski Marathon (Ski Classics Challengers)
Half-marathon (21km) option available for shorter-distance skiers

youtube_data.search_query: Orsa Gronklitt Ski Marathon cross country ski race Gronklitt

videos.title: Craft Ski Marathon 2026 in Orsa Grönklitt 🇸🇪 | Race Day, Gear Setup & Travel Vlog
videos.description:
On January 11, 2026, I took part in the incredible Craft Ski Marathon in Orsa Grönklitt, Sweden 🇸🇪❄️
In this video, I’m taking you behind the scenes of my full race experience — from travel preparations to the starting line and all the way to the finish.
🎿 In this video you’ll see:
• What I pack for a ski marathon
• How I dress for cold race conditions
• My full race-day setup
• Travel footage to Orsa Grönklitt
• Highlights from the Craft Ski Marathon course
• My race experience and impressions
The Craft Ski Marathon in Orsa Grönklitt is one of Sweden’s most scenic cross-country ski events, offering stunning winter landscapes and perfectly prepared tracks. It’s always a special experience to race in such beautiful surroundings.
If you're preparing for your own cross-country ski race, looking for gear inspiration, or just enjoy ski racing content — this one is for you!
Let me know in the comments:
Have you ever raced in Sweden? What’s your favorite ski marathon?
👍 Like & subscribe for more ski racing and endurance sports content!
#CraftSkiMarathon #OrsaGrönklitt #CrossCountrySkiing #SkiRace #SkiMarathon #RaceVlog #WinterSports #SkiGear
